creator: allan@saddi.com
text:
I suggest an update to 1.2.2 instead (the latest). The differences  
between 1.2 and 1.2.2 were minor and for the most part, did not  
affect FreeBSD.

Simply changing PORTVERSION to 1.2.2 and re-generating the sums  
should be enough.

- Allan

On Jul 28, 2006, at 1:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of security/yafic,
>
> Please note that PR ports/101002 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101002
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
